# Step 2: 输入与自动选样背景

## 2.1 当前选样结果与全样本背景

```{r}
ensure_module_result_layout("02_selection")

selected_sample_overview <- data.frame(
  sample = colnames(gene_exp),
  group = sample_info[colnames(gene_exp), "group"],
  stage = sample_info[colnames(gene_exp), "stage"],
  in_selected_set = "yes",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
selected_sample_overview$raw_sample_pool <- ncol(gene_exp_full)

write.csv(selected_sample_overview, "result/02_selection/2_1_selected_sample_table.csv", row.names = FALSE)

group_count_tbl <- selected_sample_overview %>%
  count(group, name = "sample_count") %>%
  arrange(group)
write.csv(group_count_tbl, "result/02_selection/2_2_selected_group_counts.csv", row.names = FALSE)

group_count_plot <- ggplot(group_count_tbl, aes(x = group, y = sample_count, fill = group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
  labs(title = "当前进入主分析的样本分组", x = NULL, y = "Sample count") +
  theme_rnaseq_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

save_plot_versions(
  group_count_plot,
  primary = "result/02_selection/2_3_selected_group_counts.pdf",
  width = 6,
  height = 4
)

if (!is.null(auto_selection_summary) && nrow(auto_selection_summary) > 0) {
  top_selection_tbl <- auto_selection_summary %>%
    arrange(desc(score), max_outlier_distance, desc(between_group_distance), sample_key) %>%
    slice_head(n = 15)

  write.csv(top_selection_tbl, "result/02_selection/2_4_top_auto_selection_combinations.csv", row.names = FALSE)

  selection_score_plot <- top_selection_tbl %>%
    mutate(
      combination_label = paste0(combination_type, ": ", group1_samples, " vs ", group2_samples),
      combination_label = factor(combination_label, levels = rev(combination_label))
    ) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = combination_label, y = score, fill = selected)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.75) +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = viz_rekey_colors(viz_pal$sig_gradient, c("yes" = "high", "no" = "low"))) +
    labs(title = "自动选样评分前列组合", x = NULL, y = "Selection score") +
    theme_rnaseq_minimal()

    save_plot_versions(
      selection_score_plot,
      primary = "result/02_selection/2_5_auto_selection_scores.pdf",
      width = 11,
      height = max(5, 0.45 * nrow(top_selection_tbl))
    )

    top_by_type <- auto_selection_summary %>%
      group_by(combination_type) %>%
      arrange(desc(score), max_outlier_distance, desc(between_group_distance), sample_key) %>%
      slice_head(n = 5) %>%
      ungroup()
    write.csv(top_by_type, "result/04_pca/4_4_top_combinations_by_type.csv", row.names = FALSE)
}

if (!is.null(gene_exp_full) && ncol(gene_exp_full) >= ncol(gene_exp)) {
  # Prefer counts-derived logCPM when present; otherwise use DESeq2 normalized counts.
  full_log_expr <- if (!is.null(gene_logcpm_full)) gene_logcpm_full else log2(gene_exp_full + 1)
  keep_genes <- select_top_variable_genes(full_log_expr, top_n = 5000)
  full_pca <- prcomp(t(full_log_expr[keep_genes, , drop = FALSE]), scale. = TRUE)

  full_pca_df <- as.data.frame(full_pca$x[, 1:2, drop = FALSE])
  full_pca_df$sample <- rownames(full_pca_df)
  full_pca_df$group <- full_sample_info[full_pca_df$sample, "group"]
  full_pca_df$selected <- ifelse(full_pca_df$sample %in% colnames(gene_exp), "selected", "not_selected")

  full_pca_plot <- ggplot(full_pca_df, aes(PC1, PC2, color = group, shape = selected, label = sample)) +
    geom_point(size = 3) +
    geom_text_repel(size = 3, show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_color_manual(values = group_colors) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("selected" = 17, "not_selected" = 16)) +
    labs(
      title = "全样本 PCA 与最终入选样本位置",
      x = paste0("PC1 (", round(100 * summary(full_pca)$importance[2, 1], 1), "%)"),
      y = paste0("PC2 (", round(100 * summary(full_pca)$importance[2, 2], 1), "%)")
    ) +
    theme_rnaseq_bw()

  save_plot_versions(
    full_pca_plot,
    primary = "result/02_selection/2_6_full_sample_pca_with_selection.pdf",
    width = 8.5,
    height = 6
  )
}
```

## 2.2 计数概览

```{r}
count_qc_tbl <- data.frame()

if (!is.null(gene_count_mat)) {
  count_qc_tbl <- data.frame(
    sample = colnames(gene_count_mat),
    group = sample_info[colnames(gene_count_mat), "group"],
    raw_counts = colSums(gene_count_mat),
    detected_genes_cpm1 = colSums(edgeR::cpm(gene_count_mat, log = FALSE) >= 1),
    detected_genes_cpm5 = colSums(edgeR::cpm(gene_count_mat, log = FALSE) >= 5),
    top100_gene_fraction = vapply(colnames(gene_count_mat), function(one_sample) {
      one_counts <- sort(gene_count_mat[, one_sample], decreasing = TRUE)
      sum(head(one_counts, 100)) / sum(one_counts)
    }, numeric(1)),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  write.csv(count_qc_tbl, "result/02_selection/2_1_sample_overview.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(count_qc_tbl, "result/02_selection/2_4_count_based_qc_metrics.csv", row.names = FALSE)

  complexity_plot <- ggplot(count_qc_tbl, aes(x = raw_counts / 1e6, y = detected_genes_cpm1, color = group, label = sample)) +
    geom_point(size = 3) +
    geom_text_repel(size = 3, show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_color_manual(values = group_colors) +
    labs(title = "文库复杂度与基因检测能力", x = "Raw counts (million)", y = "Detected genes (CPM >= 1)") +
    theme_rnaseq_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "top")
  save_plot_versions(
    complexity_plot,
    primary = "result/02_selection/2_5_library_complexity_scatter.pdf",
    width = 8,
    height = 5
  )

  top100_fraction_plot <- ggplot(count_qc_tbl, aes(x = sample, y = top100_gene_fraction, fill = group)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.7) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
    labs(title = "Top100 基因占比", x = NULL, y = "Fraction of library") +
    theme_rnaseq_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), legend.position = "top")
  save_plot_versions(
    top100_fraction_plot,
    primary = "result/02_selection/2_6_top100_gene_fraction.pdf",
    width = 8,
    height = 5
  )
}
```
